title: product_warnings
description: Non-blocking reviewer notes + blocking engine errors surfaced per-product. condition_json is matched against the current context; when it evaluates true, the message is attached to the BOM response. severity='error' adds to errors[]; 'warning' adds to warnings[]; 'info' adds to assumptions[].

condition_json.description: Predicate matched against the current context. Supports the comparison operator shorthand from the engine: {"key":{"gt":N,"gte":N,"lt":N,"lte":N,"eq":V,"neq":V}}. A bare value {"key":V} means equality. Example: {"panel_width_mm":{"gt":2600}}.
